blocks.text: Wærenskjold Chases Spring Classics Glory at Dwars door Vlaanderen

Wednesday belongs to cycling. Dwars door Vlaanderen serves as the final dress rehearsal before Sunday's Gent-Wevelgem — and Søren Wærenskjold lines up with a point to prove on the cobbled roads of Flanders.
🚴 Dwars door Vlaanderen 2026 — Søren Wærenskjold starts 11:55 in this pivotal Flanders warm-up

Norwegian hockey drama continues off the bike: Storhamar lead Stavanger 3-0 in the NM playoff series, and Oilers need a miracle to survive. Wednesday may bring updates as the series edges toward conclusion.
